head.clue: part of the body that contains the brain and face

arm.clue: upper limb used for reaching and lifting

leg.clue: lower limb used for standing and walking

foot.clue: part of the leg that touches the ground

nose.clue: part of the face used for smelling and breathing

brain.clue: organ that controls thought and the nervous system

hand.clue: part of the arm with fingers, used for grasping

mouth.clue: opening used for eating and speaking

tooth.clue: hard white object in the mouth used for biting

tongue.clue: fleshy organ in the mouth used for tasting

heart.clue: organ that pumps blood throughout the body

finger.clue: one of the five long parts of the hand

toe.clue: one of the digits on the foot

hair.clue: fine strands that grow from the skin

nail.clue: hard covering at the tip of a finger or toe

elbow.clue: joint between the upper and lower arm

knee.clue: joint between the thigh and the lower leg

wrist.clue: joint connecting the hand to the arm

ankle.clue: joint connecting the foot to the leg

shoulder.clue: joint connecting the arm to the torso

chest.clue: front part of the body between the neck and stomach

back.clue: rear part of the human body from neck to pelvis

neck.clue: part of the body that connects the head to the torso

chin.clue: protruding part of the face below the mouth

forehead.clue: part of the face above the eyebrows

cheek.clue: fleshy part of the face below the eye

lip.clue: either of the two fleshy parts forming the mouth

eyelash.clue: one of the short hairs growing on the edge of the eyelid

eyebrow.clue: line of hair above the eye

jaw.clue: bone that forms the framework of the mouth

skull.clue: bony structure that protects the brain

rib.clue: one of the curved bones protecting the chest

liver.clue: large organ that cleans the blood

kidney.clue: organ that filters waste from the blood to make urine

spleen.clue: organ that filters blood and helps the immune system

pancreas.clue: organ that produces insulin and digestive enzymes

intestine.clue: long tube that carries food from the stomach

appendix.clue: small tube attached to the large intestine

colon.clue: main part of the large intestine

esophagus.clue: tube that carries food from the mouth to the stomach

trachea.clue: windpipe that carries air to the lungs

larynx.clue: voice box located in the throat

pharynx.clue: part of the throat behind the mouth and nasal cavity

retina.clue: layer at the back of the eyeball sensitive to light

pupil.clue: dark circular opening in the center of the iris

cornea.clue: transparent layer forming the front of the eye

tendon.clue: tough tissue attaching muscle to bone

ligament.clue: tough tissue connecting bones to other bones

muscle.clue: tissue that contracts to produce movement

vein.clue: blood vessel that carries blood toward the heart

artery.clue: blood vessel that carries blood away from the heart

organ.clue: part of the body that has a specific vital function

nerve.clue: fiber that transmits impulses to the brain or spinal cord
